claim.content: For the fully spin-polarized two-dimensional homogeneous electron gas at density parameter r_s=10, extrapolation of finite-N DMC quartic-fit effective masses yields the thermodynamic-limit quasiparticle effective mass m^*(∞)=0.70(3) a.u., where m^*=k_F/(dE/dk)_{k_F} for the ferromagnetic Fermi wave vector.
